questions.prompt: Which declaration turns a container into a flex container?

explanations.overview: Use display: flex on the parent container.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. Use display: flex on the parent container.
byOptionId.b: Correct. Use display: flex on the parent container.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. Use display: flex on the parent container.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. Use display: flex on the parent container.

questions.prompt: What does justify-content control in a row flex container?

explanations.overview: justify-content controls spacing and alignment along the main axis.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. justify-content controls spacing and alignment along the main axis.
byOptionId.b: Correct. justify-content controls spacing and alignment along the main axis.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. justify-content controls spacing and alignment along the main axis.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. justify-content controls spacing and alignment along the main axis.
